member.name: T:CustomFractionalFee
member.summary: Custom fractional fee utility class. See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:CustomFractionalFee.FromProtobuf(Proto.FractionalFee)
member.summary: Create a custom fractional fee from a fee protobuf.
member.returns: the new custom fractional fee object

member.name: P:CustomFractionalFee.Denominator
member.summary: Extract the denominator. Assign the denominator can not be zero (0).

member.name: P:CustomFractionalFee.AssessmentMethod
member.summary:
Assign the assessment method inclusive / exclusive.

If the assessment method field is set, the token's custom fee is charged to the sending account and the receiving account receives the full token transfer amount. If this field is set to false, the receiver pays for the token custom fees and gets the remaining token balance. INCLUSIVE(false) EXCLUSIVE(true) See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:CustomFractionalFee.ToFractionalFeeProtobuf
member.summary: Convert the fractional fee object to a protobuf.
